goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'the cambridge belfry'.
Make sure you get 'star of the hotel', 'address', and 'whether they have free parking'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
